title: Discover your ideal destination!
thanks: Thank you for answering our quiz!
thanks_second_part: We analyzed your answers and found the perfect destination for your next trip… 🎯
thanks_third_part: You can now discover your ideal destination just by clicking on the button below. ⤵️
appDescription: It's a scratch-off world map that transforms your travel into an interactive and unforgettable adventure! 🚀 Discover amazing places around you, explore the world at your own pace, take photos of your adventures to check off your journey and collect your memories like a true explorer.
goodNews: Good news: the app is arriving just in time for summer vacation! 🌞 To stay updated on the launch, join us here:
excited: We can't wait to take you on this adventure! 🚀🔥
